auth.enterUsernameAndSeed: Pinda zita rekushandisa uye mutsara wembeu

settings.sqSetupDesc: Kana ukakanganwa password yako, unogona kuwanazve kuwana nekupindura mibvunzo mitatu. Iwe unogona kushandisa mibvunzo yako pachako kana iyo yakasarudzika.
settings.pwReminderDesc: Cheki yemwedzi - ita shuwa kuti unorangarira password yako yekupinda.
settings.pwIncorrectDesc: Isu tinokukurudzira kuti uvandudze password yako iwe uchinge wapinda mukati, kuti usarasikirwe nekuwana.
settings.clearCacheConfirm:
Bvisa media cache uye data yenguva pfupi?

Encryption kiyi uye marongero HAZVICHADZIMWA.
settings.sessionTooYoungForPwChange:
Session inofanirwa kunge ichishanda kweanenge mazuva manomwe kuti uchinje password.

settings.waitDaysWarning: 7 days hadzisati dzapera. Ndokumbira umire {daysLeft} mamwe mazuva.

panic.callSettingsNote: Cherechedza: Nzira dze Force TCP uye Relay dzinogona kuwedzera kufamba kunonoka asi dzinopa kuvanda kwakanyanya. Kufukidza traffic kunowedzera kudzika kusina kufungidzirwa kumisangano yeSDP.
panic.desc: Ruzivo rwose pano node ruchagurwa nekusingaperi. Chiito ichi hachingadzoswe.
panic.warningBody:
Wave kuda kuparadza zvachose data rese.
Ichi chiito hachigone kuregererwa.
panic.allTracesRemoved: Maronda ese abviswa. Chirongwa ichi chapera.

privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Kiyi itsva yemba inogamuchirwa — tuma otomatiki kuzvishandiso zvako zvose (E2E yakakomiwa)
privacy.backupHint: Komba makiyi ose nepasiwedi uye sachira kuseva. Chinja zvishandiso — dzosa nechinongedzero chimwe.
privacy.crossSignHint: Simbisa zvishandiso zvitsva otomatiki nekusaina kweHMAC (kudzivirira kutsivana)
privacy.federatedHint: Govera zvikamu zvechikuva chakakomiwa pane nodes dzefederation. Kunyange seva yarasika — dzosa nekuburikidza neshamwari.
privacy.historySyncHint: Kopi yakakomiwa yemeseji inowanikwa pazvishandiso zvose. Seva inona ruzha rwega
privacy.ktHint: Log inowedzerwa chete yemishanduko yose yemakiyi eruzhinji ine ketani yehash (Merkle). Seva inosainia chekupinda chimwe nechimwe — nhema inoonekwa panguva yekuongorora.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Endesa makiyi kuzvishandiso zvitsva nekuburikidza nechinhu chechiverengwa 6. Makiyi akakomiwa neECIES — seva haigoni kuaerenga.
privacy.ssssHint: Patsanura kiyi huru kuzvikamu N. Zvikamu zvimwe zvivi M zvichadzosa kiyi. Chikamu chimwe nechimwe chakakomiwa kumukurukuri wako wekuvimba nawo (ECIES). Seva inona blobs dzakakomiwa chete.
privacy.title: Kuvanda

keyBackup.passphraseRestoreHint: Isa chirevo chawakashandisa paunenge uchigadzira backup.
keyBackup.deleteBackupConfirm: Kudzima kiyi yekuchengetedza? Chiito ichi hachidzoreki.
keyBackup.revokeSharesConfirm: Ukanzure zvikamu zvese zvakakosha? Kudzoreredza kuburikidza nevanhu vanovimbwa navo hazvigoneke.
keyBackup.splitKeyDesc: Yako tenzi kiyi ichakamurwa kuita N share uchishandisa Shamir chirongwa. Chero M migove inobvumira kiyi kudzoreredza. Kugova kwega kwega kwakavharirwa kune mumwe munhu anovimba naye.
keyBackup.minTwoPeers: Kanokwana 2 vezera vanoshanda vane encryption inodiwa
keyBackup.deleteFederatedConfirm: Kudzima backup yemubatanidzwa? Shards pavezera ichasara, asi metadata icharasika.

botConstructor.title: Bot Constructor
botConstructor.subtitle: Vaka yako bot nekuona - hapana kodhi inodiwa
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Mharidzo yekugamuchira kana mushandisi atanga bot...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Mauya! Ini ndiri bhoti yako. Shandisa/rubatsiro kuona mirairo.
botConstructor.docsCommand: Inopindura kana mushandisi atumira murairo chaiwo (semuenzaniso /rubatsiro, /kutanga). Iwe unogona kuwedzera nhanho dzekukurukurirana kugadzira akawanda-nhanho dialogs.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Inopindura kana meseji yemushandisi ichienderana nepateni. Inoshandisa regex - e.g. "mhoro|hi" rinoenderana nemazwi ese ari maviri. Nyaya-isina hanya.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: Iwo ekutanga meseji vashandisi vanoona pavanotanga bot ne/start. Yese bot inofanirwa kuve neyayo.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Inotumira meseji otomatiki pahurongwa. Yakanakira zviyeuchidzo zvezuva nezuva, digesti yevhiki nevhiki, kana zviziviso zvenguva nenguva.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Mapazi bot logic. Tarisa shanduko kana mushandisi wekuisa uye pindura zvakasiyana zvichienderana nemhedzisiro.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot inotora mhinduro imwe chete kubva pane rondedzero. Yakakwana kune majee, matipi, kwaziso, kana mhinduro dzakasiyana.
botConstructor.docsApi: Inoita chikumbiro cheHTTP kune yekunze API uye inoshandisa mhinduro mune bot meseji. Shandisa {data.field} kuratidza nzvimbo dzemhinduro.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Inotumira chiziviso kune kamuri admin kana yamutswa. Inobatsira pakuzivisa, zviziviso zvitsva zvemushandisi, kana moderation.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Wedzera matanho kune Command block kuti ugadzire ma dialog anopindirana. Nhanho imwe neimwe inobvunza mubvunzo, inomirira mhinduro yemushandisi, uye inoichengeta kune inosiyana. Shandisa zvinosiyana mumhinduro yekupedzisira ine {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Shandisa matinji akamonana {variable} mumashoko ekupindura kuisa ma values ​​akasimba. Mamiriro ezvinhu ehurumende anoramba aripo pamashoko ose.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Akavakirwa-mukati akasiyana anowanikwa mune yega mhinduro:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Tanga neKugamuchira block - ndicho chinhu chekutanga vashandisi kuona
botConstructor.docsTip2: Wedzera a/help command inonyora zvese zviripo mirairo
botConstructor.docsTip3: Shandisa matanho ehurukuro kunyoresa, ongororo, kana kuunganidza data
botConstructor.docsTip4: Sanganisa Mamiriro ezvivharo ane zvinosiyana zve smart branching
botConstructor.docsTip5: Edza bhoti yako nekutaura nayo mukamuri mushure mekutumira

gravitixDocs.title: Gravitix Mutauro Reference
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Mutauro wekunyora wepamusoro wekuvaka bots. 96 zvinhu. Ngura kumashure.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: Gravitix idomain-specific language (DSL) yakagadzirirwa kubva pasi kuti inyore Vortex bots. Iko kune mimwe mitauro inoda maraibhurari, macallbacks, uye boilerplate, Gravitix inokupa iwe yekutanga-kirasi chiitiko vanobata, hurukuro inoyerera, uye yakavakirwa-mukati mamiriro - zvese mune yakachena, inoverengeka syntax yakafemerwa naRust.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Inoverengwa — kodhi inoverengwa sevavariro, kwete muchina
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Yakachengeteka - static mhando dzinobata zvikanganiso nguva isati yasvika
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Expressive - inoyerera, magadhi, uye mapatani ekufananidza akavakirwa-mukati
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Minimal - hapana makirasi, hapana nhaka, hapana maitiro ekudzidza
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: Gravitix ndeye chero munhu anoda kuvaka Vortex bot nekukurumidza - ingave usati wambonyora kodhi kare, kana iwe uri mugadziri ane ruzivo akaneta nePython boilerplate. Iyi referensi inodzidzisa Gravitix kubva pamisimboti yekutanga: hapana chiitiko chekutanga chinodiwa.
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Chikamu chimwe nechimwe chinovaka pane zvakapfuura. Kana iwe uri mutsva kuhurongwa, verenga kubva kumusoro kusvika pasi. Kana iwe uchitoziva mumwe mutauro, shandisa tafura yezviri mukati kusvetukira zvakananga kune zvaunofarira iwe.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Iyo inokurumidza nzira kubva ku zero kuenda kune inomhanya bot.
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: pa / kutanga {... } - inotsanangura mubatsiri anomhanya kana mushandisi atumira / kutanga. emit "..." - inotumira meseji kumushandisi. {ctx.first_name} - inoshandura zita rekutanga remushandisi mutambo.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: MuGravitix IDE, tinya bhatani reMhanya mubhari yepamusoro. Pinda yako Vortex Bot Token kana wakurudzirwa. Iyo bot inotanga nekukurumidza - hapana nhanho yekuvaka inodiwa.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Yese chirongwa cheGravitix chinovakwa kubva kune matatu ekutanga mabhuroki ekuvaka: mabati, emit zvirevo, uye pfungwa.
gravitixDocs.multipleHandlers: Multiple handlers for the same trigger
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Yese kukosha muGravitix ine mhando. Iyo mhando sisitimu yakamira: mhando dzinotariswa panguva yekuunganidza, yako bot isati yatanga.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Vashandi vanosanganisa maitiro kuti vabudise hutsva hutsva.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Tambo muGravitix ndeye UTF-8 encoded mavara. Ivo vanotsigira kwakapfuma kududzira uye sutu yezvakavakirwa-mukati mashandiro.
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Patani-kuenzanisa kukosha kune akawanda mapatani. Funga nezvayo sechirevo chine simba chekuchinja.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Mabasa mabhuroko ekodhi anogona kushandiswa zvakare. Vanokubatsira kuti udzivise kudzokorora uye kuita kuti kodhi ive nyore kunzwisisa.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Vabati ndivo moyo weGravitix bot. Mumwe nemumwe anobata anoteerera imwe mhando yechiitiko uye anomhanya kana chiitiko ichocho chikaitika.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Varindi vanokutendera kuti uwedzere chimiro kune mubati. Mubati anomhanya chete kana murindi akaongorora kuti ichokwadi.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Chinhu chectx chinowanikwa otomatiki mukati memubati wese. Iine ruzivo nezve meseji iripo uye mushandisi akaitumira.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: State inoita kuti bot yako irangarire zvinhu pakati pemameseji. Pasina nyika, meseji yega yega yakazvimirira uye bot haina ndangariro.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Kuyerera kunoita kuti unyore hurukuro-nhanho dzakawanda mumutsara, unoverengeka maitiro. Kuyerera kunogona kumbomira uye kumirira meseji yemushandisi inotevera.
gravitixDocs.emitDesc: Kutumira mameseji ndiko kutanga kuburitsa kwebhoti.
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Mhanya kodhi otomatiki pane hurongwa - hapana cron mabasa, hapana ekunze masevhisi anodiwa.
gravitixDocs.everyRepeat: imwe neimwe - dzokorora pane imwe nguva
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: Mushandi wepombi |> inopa kukosha senharo yekutanga kune inotevera basa. Inoita kuti ketani mashandiro averengeke, kuruboshwe kuenda kurudyi.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: Gravitix inopa yakarongeka kukanganisa kubata nekuedza / kubata / pakupedzisira zvidhinha.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Zvigadzirwa zvinokutendera kuti uunganidze data rakabatana pasi pemhando ine zita. Enums inotsanangura seti yakavharwa yezvakasiyana.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: Gravitix inotakura yakazara math raibhurari ine ~ 180 mabasa.
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: Gravitix ine rudzi rwekuzvarwa rwakaoma - maviri e64-bit anoyangarara anomiririra chaiwo uye ekufungidzira zvikamu.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: Gravitix inosanganisira manhamba calculus: zvinobuda uye zvinosanganisirwa zvakaverengerwa pamabasa asina kurongeka.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: Linear algebra ndiyo masvomhu evectors uye matrices.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Dzidziso yenhamba inoongorora maitiro eintegers. Nheyo yemazuva ano cryptography.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Nhamba dzinopa maturusi ekutsanangura, kuongorora, uye kutora mhedziso kubva kune data.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Special mabasa ndiwo mhinduro kune akakosha musiyano equations.
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Iyo Fourier shanduko inoparadza chiratidzo muzvikamu zvayo.
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: Nzira yakanakisa yekudzidza Gravitix ndeyekuvaka. Tanga neiyo nyore echo bot, wobva wawedzera nyika, wobva wawedzera kuyerera. Imwe neimwe pfungwa itsva yaunodzidza inovhura mamwe mikana.

bestpractices.h3: 3. Shandisa guards pachinzvimbo chekuti if-cheni yemvumo
bestpractices.p1: Mapeteni nemaitiro anoita kuti yako Gravitix bots ive yakavimbika, inoverengeka, uye inochengeteka.
bestpractices.p2: Yese bot inofanirwa kunge iine yekudzokera kumashure on msg inobata kuti vashandisi vanogara vachiwana mhinduro:
bestpractices.p3: Usambofa wakafungidzira kuti zvakatumirwa nemushandisi ndezvechokwadi:
bestpractices.p4: Chengeta vanobata pfupi. Fambisa pfungwa dzakaoma kune dzakapihwa mazita:
bestpractices.p6: Nzira yakanakisa yekudzidza Gravitix ndeyekuvaka. Tanga ne simple echo bot, wobva wawedzera state, wobva wawedzera flows. Imwe neimwe pfungwa itsva yaunodzidza inovhura mamwe mikana.

bitwise.cc5: Mvumo mireza - chikamu chimwe nechimwe mvumo
bitwise.p1: Bitwise opareta vanoshanda zvakananga pabhinari inomiririra ye integers. Imwe neimwe nhamba ndeye 64-bit yakasainwa kukosha; bitwise ops vanoitora senhevedzano ye64 bits.

builtins.cc5: dhinda/log gamuchira chero nhamba yenharo dzemhando ipi neipi:
builtins.p1: Gravitix inosanganisira yakapfuma yakajairika raibhurari. Ese akavakirwa-mukati mabasa anogara aripo - hapana kunze kwenyika kunodiwa.
builtins.p2: Rondedzero yekutsigira nzira-kufona syntax mukuwedzera kune akamira mabasa:
builtins.p3: Verenga kukosha kubva ku OS nharaunda - inobatsira kune zvakavanzika senge API makiyi:
builtins.p4: Usanyore API makiyi kana tokeni zvakananga mufaira rako .grav. Shandisa env("KEY_NAME") uye isa iyo inoshanduka munzvimbo yako yekuendesa.
builtins.p5: Aya mabasa anodhinda kune server console - isingaonekwe kune vashandisi, inobatsira panguva yekuvandudza:
builtins.td22: Round kusvika kune iripedyo nhamba yakazara
builtins.td29: Shandura kuita nhamba (truncates float, zvikamu str)
builtins.td34: Ruboshwe-pedhi tambo kune yakapihwa hupamhi (default pad char inzvimbo)
builtins.td49: Chokwadi kana kukosha kuri nhamba yakazara

complex_type.cc6: Polar fomu: inomiririra z nehukuru uye kona
complex_type.li5: Simba: z**n inoshandisa fomula yaDe Moivre yenhamba n.
complex_type.p1: Nhamba yakaoma ine chimiro a + bi, apo a ndicho chikamu chaicho uye b ndicho chikamu chekufungidzira. i iyuniti yekufungidzira inotsanangurwa ne i² = −1. Nhamba dzakaomarara dzinowedzera mutsara chaiwo kundege, zvichibvumira mhinduro kuequations senge x² + 1 = 0 isina mhinduro chaiyo.
complex_type.p2: Mu Gravitix unonyora zvinyorwa zvekufungidzira ne i chivakashure:
complex_type.p3: Ese mana ekutanga mashandiro anoshanda pane yakaoma kukosha zvakananga. Gravitix inotevedzera yakajairwa yakaoma arithmetic mitemo:
complex_type.p4: Signal processing (odhiyo kuongororwa, FFT), fractal generation (Mandelbrot set), fizikisi simulations, magetsi impedance kuverenga, uye quantum computing zvese zvinoda arithmetic yakaoma. Gravitix inoita kuti umhanye aya maverengero mukati me Vortex bot isina maraibhurari ekunze.
complex_type.td14: Kubva pachimiro chepakati: r·e^(iθ) = r·cos θ + ir·sin θ
complex_type.td24: Trig mabasa akawedzerwa kusvika kune yakaoma ndege

ctx.td14: Ichokwadi kana mutumiri ari bot account
ctx.td16: Ichokwadi kana mushandisi ari boka admin
ctx.td18: Chokwadi kana mushandisi aine Vortex Premium
ctx.td36: Chokwadi kana meseji iine odhiyo yezwi

emit.p1: Tumira meseji kune chero mushandisi neyavo ID (inobatsira mumabasa akarongwa kana nhepfenyuro ye admin):

error.p1: Putira chero kodhi inogona kutadza mu try block. Kana kukanganisa kuri thrown - kungave ne Gravitix nguva yekumhanya kana zvakajeka nekodhi yako - kuuraya kunosvetukira kune catch block. Ukoshi hwakabatwa hunosungirirwa kune musiyano waunotumidza zita catch.
error.p2: finally inomhanya zvisina magumo - ingave iyo try yakabudirira kana iyo catch yakabata chikanganiso. Ishandise kuburitsa zviwanikwa, log, kana kutumira meseji yekupedzisa.
error.p3: Shandisa kukanganisa kubata pamashandisirwo anoenderana nekupinza kwekunze: kupatsanura mushandisi mavara, kudana APIs, kuverenga nharaunda dzakasiyana, kana kuita yakaoma math uko domain kukanganisa (sqrt ye negative, log ye zero) inogoneka. Kune zvikanganiso zvemukati zvepfungwa, sarudza guard zvinyorwa uye kutanga returns.

examples.p1: Yakazara, mabhoti anoshanda anoratidza maitiro akafanana.
examples.p2: Iyo simplest inobatsira bot - inodzokorora everyzvinotaurwa nemushandisi.
examples.p3: Iyo simple bot inoverengera mabhatani kudzvanya pamushandisi.

flows.cc1: inomira pano, inotangazve kana mushandisi apindura
flows.p2: wait inomisa iripo flow kudzamara chiitiko chakataurwa chaitika. Kukosha kwechiitiko returned:
flows.p3: Kana flow ikarova wait, inochengetedza ese machinjiro emunharaunda uye kumbomira. Kana mushandisi atumira iyo inotevera meseji, iyo flow inotangazve chaipo payakasiira. Izvi zvinoitika pachena - unongonyora mutsara kodhi.

functions.cc1: kufona kukwazisa, kwete return kukosha kwashandiswa
functions.p2: Pfuura data mune basa rine paramita (zita: mhando):
functions.p3: Zivisa iyo return mhando mushure -> uye shandisa return:
functions.p4: Shandisa mabhaketi emakona emhando dzegeneric mumaparamita:
functions.p5: Basa rinogona kuridaidza self (nehanya kune avoid kusingaperi kudzokorora):
functions.p6: Nguva yekumhanya inomanikidza kudzika kwekufona (kazhinji 200) kudzivirira stack pamusoro flows.

guard.p1: Kana mushandisi asiri admin, wekutanga mubati guard anotadza, uye Gravitix inowira kune wechipiri inobata.
guard.p2: Gara uchipa chibatiso chisina guard chekubata nyaya kana vese guarded vanobata vasvetuka. Izvi zvinoita kuti vashandisi vagamuchire mhinduro.

handlers.cc1: Izvi zvinoshanda kune mamwe mameseji ese
handlers.cc2: ctx.chinyorwa che /echo mhoro nyika → "/echo mhoro nyika"
handlers.p1: Vortex mirairo inotanga na /. Match navo ne:
handlers.p2: Inomhanya kune chero meseji yakajeka (kwete murairo):
handlers.p3: Iwe unogona kutsanangura vazhinji vanobata sezvaunoda. Vanomhanya vakazvimiririra:
handlers.p4: Mirairo inogona kusanganisira nharo. Iyo meseji izere (command + args) inowanikwa kuburikidza ctx.text:
handlers.p5: Kana vabati vakawanda vachigona match, vanotariswa muhurongwa hwavanenge vakanyorwa. Yekutanga match inokunda. Iyo on msg mubati anowanzo kupedzisira seyekudzokera shure.
handlers.td10: Chiitiko chese, zvisinei nerudzi — catch-zvese zvinodzokera shure

if.p1: Conditional execution: mhanyisa kodhi yakasiyana zvichienderana nemamiriro.
if.p2: Shandisa elif kumapazi akawanda. Chekutanga chete matching bazi rinomhanya:
if.p3: Deep deep inoita kuti kodhi ive yakaoma kuverenga. Sarudze return kutanga kudzikamisa mapazi:
if.p4: Chero kutaura kunoongorora ku bool kunoshanda sechimiro:

intro.li2: Safe - static types catch kukanganisa nguva isati yasvika
intro.li3: Expressive - flows, guards, uye pateni matching zvakavakwa-mukati
intro.li4: Minimal - hapana makirasi, hapana nhaka, hapana maitiro ekudzidza
intro.p1: Gravitix mutauro wakanangana nedomasi (DSL) wakagadzirwa kubva pasi kuti unyore Vortex bots. Kune mimwe mitauro inoda maraibhurari, macallbacks, uye boilerplate, Gravitix inokupa ekutanga-kirasi kubata zviitiko, nhaurirano flows, uye yakavakirwa-mukati state — zvese mumutauro wakachena, unoverengeka wakafuridzirwa na Rust.
intro.p2: Gravitix ndeye ani nani anoda kuvaka Vortex bot nekukurumidza - kungave usati wambonyora kodhi, kana kuti uri mugadziri ane ruzivo aneta ne Python boilerplate. Chirevo ichi chinodzidzisa Gravitix kubva pamisimboti yekutanga: hapana chiitiko chekutanga chinodiwa.
intro.p3: Chikamu chimwe nechimwe chinovaka pane zvakapfuura. Kana iwe uri mutsva kuhurongwa, verenga kubva kumusoro kusvika pasi. Kana iwe uchitoziva mumwe mutauro, shandisa tafura yezviri mukati kusvetukira zvakananga kune zvaunofarira iwe.
intro.p4: Mukati mereferensi iyi, → zvinoreva "kuongorora ku" kana "kugadzira", uye // ... inoreva zvirevo zvisingatariswe nemuunganidzi.

loops.cc3: continue - svetuka kuenda kune inotevera iteration
loops.p3: Ita shuwa kuti mamiriro anozopedzisira ave false, kana shandisa break kubuda. Iyo nguva yekumhanya inodzivirira kubva pazvishwe zvisingaperi zvine nhanho inogumira.
loops.p4: Iterate pamusoro every chinhu mune runyorwa:

match.p1: _ ndiyo wildcard - iyo matches chero chinhu chisina match maoko ekare.
match.p2: Match vachipesana nemaitiro enguva dzose ane /pattern/flags:
match.p3: Shandisa block { ... } kana iwe uchida anopfuura imwe statement:

math_calculus.cc10: Nzvimbo ye semicircle ine radius 1: inofanira kuva π/2
math_calculus.cc11: Uwandu hunotarisirwa: E[X] = ∫ x·p(x) dx pane kugoverwa kwemazuva ose
math_calculus.cc14: Taylor akatevedzana e^x kutenderedza x=0: 1 + x + x²/2! + x³/3! +...
math_calculus.cc16: Newton's method step: x₁ = x₀ − f(x₀)/f'(x₀)
math_calculus.cc2: Chechipiri chinobva pa x² ndeye 2 (nguva dzose curvature)
math_calculus.p1: Iyo derivative f'(x) inoyera kuti f inoshanduka sei padanho x. Geometrically ndiwo mutsetse we tangent line. Gravitix inoshandisa musiyano wepakati kune yekutanga kubva (mhosho O(h²)) uye yechipiri-odha fomula yezvinobvamo zvechipiri.
math_calculus.p2: An integral ∫f(x)dx kubva ku a to b ndiyo nzvimbo iri pasi pe curve. Gravitix inopa nzira nhatu nekuwedzera kurongeka:
math_calculus.td17: Pfupiso Σ f(k) ye k = kubva..kusvika
math_calculus.td18: Chigadzirwa Π f(k) che k = kubva..kusvika

math_complex.cc10: (−1)^(1/3) ine macube midzi mundege yakaoma kunzwisisa
math_complex.cc4: Midzi yekubatana: n-th midzi ye1 ari e^(2πik/n) ye k=0..n-1
math_complex.cc6: Möbius shanduko inoisa madenderedzwa/mitsetse kuenda kudenderedzwa/mitsetse
math_complex.li2: Kupopotedzana arg(z) = atan2(b, a) — kona kubva kugomba chairo
math_complex.p1: Nhamba yega yega yakaoma z = a + bi inogona kuonekwa sepoindi (a, b) pa Argand ndege. Axis yakachinjika ndiyo akisi chaiyo, yakatwasuka ndiyo yekufungidzira axis.
math_complex.p2: Chimwe chezvakakosha kuzivikanwa mumasvomhu: e^(ix) = cos x + i·sin x. Izvi zvinoreva kuti denderedzwa reyuniti mundege yakaoma inoiswa parametr nekona x.
math_complex.p3: Iyo yakaoma exponential, sine, cosine, uye logarithm inowedzerwa kune yakazara yakaoma ndege. Yavo Taylor yakatevedzana inoshandura everykupi (kana padhisiki regi).
math_complex.p4: Kune yakaoma z uye w, z^w = e^(w·ln z). Izvi zvinobvumira vasiri-integer uye yakaoma exponents, ichiratidza hukama hunoshamisa:
math_complex.td12: Zvinoita z^n kune maexponents akaoma kunzwisisa
math_complex.td4: Principal bazi; discontinuous pane negative real axis

math_core.p1: Ese trig mabasa anotarisira makona mu radians. Shandisa radians(deg) kushandura kubva kumadhigirii.
math_core.td17: Tangent = sin/cos. Hazvina kutsanangurwa pana π/2 + nπ
math_core.td21: Engi yevheji (x,y) kubva kune yakanaka x-axis. Renji (−π, π]. Mabatiro x=0.
math_core.td25: Shandura madhigirii kuita radians: d × π/180
math_core.td26: Natural log (base e). ln(e) = 1, ln(1) = 0. Domain x > 0.
math_core.td27: Binary log. log₂(1024) = 10. Nhamba yebhiti inodiwa.
math_core.td34: Kutenderedza kusvika padhuze nhamba yakazara (hafu kure ne zero)
math_core.td39: Chokwadi kana |a−b| < eps (default 1e-9). Yakachengeteka float kuenzanisa.
math_core.td45: Kupirikira mutsetse: a + t·(b−a). t=0→a, t=1→b

math_linalg.p1: A vector is an ordered list of numbers. Inogona kumiririra poindi muchadenga, gwara, kumhanya, kana chimiro mu ML.
math_linalg.p2: A matrix i 2D array yenhamba. Mx n matrix ine m mitsara uye n makoramu. Matrix mashandiro anoumba musimboti wemutsara shanduko.
math_linalg.td1: Dot chigadzirwa: Σ aᵢ·bᵢ. Mhedzisiro ndeye scalar. dot(a,b) = |a||b|cos θ
math_linalg.td10: Matrix kuwanda (A is m×k, B is k×n → mhedzisiro m×n)
math_linalg.td11: Wedzera every chinhu ne scalar s
math_linalg.td14: Inverse matrix A⁻¹ zvekuti A·A⁻¹ = Ini (Gauss-Jordan)
math_linalg.td17: n× n identity matrix (1s pane diagonal)
math_linalg.td19: Gadzirisa mutsara system Ax = b kuburikidza neGaussian kubviswa
math_linalg.td2: Muchinjikwa chigadzirwa cheviri 3D mavheji. Mhedzisiro ⊥ zvese zvinopinda. |a×b| = |a||b|chivi θ
math_linalg.td7: Wedzera chinhu chimwe nechimwe ne scalar s

math_numth.cc1: RSA chizvarwa chakakosha chinovimba ne modinv:
math_numth.cc4: Goldbach fungidziro yekutarisa: every kunyangwe n> 2 ihuwandu hwemaprimes maviri
math_numth.td1: Yakakura yakajairika divisor kuburikidza neEuclidean algorithm. gcd(12,8)=4
math_numth.td19: Kunwisa nhamba dzerudzi rwechipiri: zvikamu zve n kupinda k zvisina-isina chinhu
math_numth.td21: Nhamba dzeCatalan: bracket sequences, binary miti
math_numth.td25: Nhamba dzeBernoulli (dzinooneka muTaylor mutsara we trig/log)
math_numth.td3: Zvese zvakanaka divisor zve n, zvakarongwa. divisor(12)=[1,2,3,4,6,12]
math_numth.td4: Euler's totient φ(n): kuverenga kwezvikamu mu [1,n] coprime kusvika n
math_numth.td5: Modular inverse: x zvekuti a·x ≡ 1 (mod m). Inoshandiswa mu RSA.
math_numth.td6: Kukurumidza modular exponentiation: base ^ exp mod. O(log exp).
math_numth.td8: Ese maprimes kusvika n kuburikidza neSieve yeEratosthenes

math_special.cc12: Perimeter yeellipse ine semi-axes a, b:
math_special.cc3: Apéry's constant: ζ(3) haina musoro asi hapana yakavharika fomu inozivikanwa
math_special.cc4: J₀(x): oscillates uye kuora - inotsanangura masaisai eradial
math_special.cc5: Y₀(x): inotsauka pa x=0, inotenderera pahombe x
math_special.cc6: Ai inoora zvakanyanya nokuda kwe x→+∞, inotenderera ye x→-∞
math_special.p1: Iyo Gamma basa Γ(n) ndiyo inoenderera mberi kugadzirwa kwefactorial: Γ(n) = (n−1)! kune positive integers. Inowedzera factorial kune nhamba chaidzo uye dzakaoma kunzwisisa.
math_special.p2: Iko kukanganisa basa erf(x) = (2/√π)∫₀ˣ e^(−t²)dt ndiyo yakakosha yeGaussian. Iyo yakanangana neyakajairwa CDF uye inoonekwa mukupisa equations uye mukana wedzidziso.
math_special.p3: ζ(s) = Σ 1/nˢ ye n=1,2,3,… (apo Re(s)>1). Inobatanidza kune yekutanga kugovera kuburikidza neEuler chigadzirwa. Iyo Riemann Hypothesis (isina kugadziriswa!) inobata zero dze ζ mundege yakaoma.
math_special.p4: Bessel mabasa Jₙ(x) uye Yₙ(x) mhinduro kuBessel's differential equation: x²y'' + xy' + (x²−n²)y = 0. Zvinoonekwa mukuparadzira kwemasaisai, kuitisa kupisa mumasilinda, uye quantum mechanics.
math_special.p5: Ai(x) naBi(x) mhinduro ku y'' = xy. Ivo vanoonekwa mu quantum tunneling (WKB approximation) uye optics (diffraction).
math_special.p6: Idzi mhuri dzepolynomial dzinomuka senge eigenfunctions yeakakosha anoshanda uye anoshandiswa mu spectral nzira, quadrature, uye quantum mechanics.
math_special.p7: K(k) uye E(k) azere elliptic zvibatanidzwa zvekutanga neyechipiri mhando. Vanoverenga nguva yependulum isina mutsara uye perimeter ye ellipse.
math_special.td5: Pₙ(x): orthogonal pa [-1,1]. Angular chikamu chehydrogen wavefunctions.
math_special.td6: Hₙ(x): orthogonal w.r.t. e^(−x²). Quantum harmonic oscillator.
math_special.td8: Lₙ(x): orthogonal pa [0,∞) w.r.t. e^(−x). Hydrogen radial wavefunctions.

math_stats.cc2: Ndechipi chikamu chevanhu chibodzwa pazasi pe600 pa SAT (μ=500, σ=100)?
math_stats.cc3: Probability yemisoro mitatu chaiyo mu 10 fair coin flips
math_stats.cc4: Avhareji 2 vatengi/miniti, mukana we5 chaiwo muminiti?
math_stats.li1: r = 1: hukama hwakanaka hwakanaka (sezvo X inokura, Y inokura zvakaenzana)
math_stats.p1: Zvichipihwa runyorwa rwenhamba, aya mabasa anopfupisa iyo data yepakati maitiro uye kupararira:
math_stats.p2: Covariance cov(X,Y) = E[(X−μₓ)(Y−μᵧ)] inoyera kuti mabhii maviri anofamba pamwechete. Kuwirirana r = cov(X,Y)/(σₓ·σᵧ) inogadzirisa izvi ku [-1, 1]:
math_stats.p3: linreg(xs, ys) inokodzera mutsara wepamusoro y = a + bx kuburikidza nemapoinzi edata uchishandisa akajairwa masikweya. Inodzoka [slope, intercept, r_squared].
math_stats.td11: CDF: P(X ≤ x) yekugovera zvakajairika. Inoshandisa erf approximation.
math_stats.td15: Sample kubva kuN(μ,σ) uchishandisa Bhokisi-Muller shanduko
math_stats.td3: Kukosha kwepakati kana zvarongwa. Kune kunyange n, avhareji yemhando mbiri dzepakati.
math_stats.td5: Avhareji yekutsauka kubva kune zvinoreva: Σ(xᵢ−μ)²/n
math_stats.td8: Gadzirisa kusvika ku zero zvinoreva musiyano weyuniti: (xᵢ−μ)/σ

math_transforms.cc1: Synthesize chiratidzo: huwandu hwe440Hz uye 880Hz sine mafungu
math_transforms.cc10: Tsvaga frequency yakawanda mu data yakapihwa nemushandisi
math_transforms.cc11: Low-pass filter: zero out high-frequency bins
math_transforms.cc2: (sample rate = 8 samples dzedemo, kushandiswa chaiko kungave 44100)
math_transforms.cc5: Tarisa ukuru hwefrequency bin yega yega
math_transforms.cc6: Convolution: shandisa bhokisi refirita (avhareji inofamba) kutsetseka data
math_transforms.cc8: Rwendo rwekutenderera: fft → ifft inofanira kupora yepakutanga
math_transforms.li3: Iyo FFT inokokorodza mhedzisiro yakafanana ne DFT asi muO(n log n) vs O(n²) - ye n=1024 ndiko 1024 mashandiro vs miriyoni imwe.
math_transforms.p1: Tichipihwa kutevedzana kweN samples x[0], x[1], ..., x[N-1], Discrete Fourier Transform inoburitsa N yakaoma frequency zvikamu X[k]:
math_transforms.p2: MP3 uye AAC odhiyo compression, JPEG mufananidzo compression, 5G isina waya kutapurirana, radar chiratidzo kugadzirisa, uye MRI mufananidzo reconstruction zvese zvinoenderana ne FFT algorithm. Kuinzwisisa kunokupa nzwisiso mune yakakura chunk yemazuva ano tekinoroji.
math_transforms.td1: Fast Fourier Shanduko (Cooley-Tukey). xs: rondedzero ye floats kana yakaoma. Inodzosa rondedzero yakaoma. Yakanakira N = simba re2.
math_transforms.td2: Inverse FFT. Reconstructs yenguva-domain chiratidzo kubva kune spectrum.
math_transforms.td3: Naive O(n²) DFT. Mhedzisiro yakafanana sefft, inoshanda kune chero N.
math_transforms.td4: Kuchinja: (a★b)[n] = Σₖ a[k]·b[n−k]. Inoshandiswa mu FIR mafirita.
math_transforms.td5: Ongorora Laplace shandura polynomial panguva yakaoma s

operators.p4: Shandisa maparenthes kunyora pamusoro: (a + b) * c.

pipe.cc2: Na pipe - inoverenga kubva kuruboshwe kuenda kurudyi:
pipe.cc3: Yakaenzana ne: trim(mavara madiki(" HELLO WORLD "))
pipe.cc5: Gadzirisa uye utumire mune imwe ketani
pipe.cc6: patsanura(tambo, patsanuri) - tambo iri piped mukati
pipe.cc7: tsiva(tambo, kubva, kuenda) - tambo iri piped mukati
pipe.p1: Kana basa richida nharo dzinopfuura imwe, iyo piped kukosha inova iyo first nharo uye mamwe oenda mumaparentheses:

quickstart.li1: on /start { ... } - inotsanangura mubato unomhanya kana mushandisi atumira /start
quickstart.p1: Gadzira faira idzva rinonzi main.grav uye nyora:
quickstart.p2: Mu Gravitix IDE, tinya Mhanya ▶ bhatani riri mubhawa repamusoro. Pinda yako Vortex Bot Token kana wakurudzirwa. Iyo bot inotanga nekukurumidza - hapana nhanho yekuvaka inodiwa.
quickstart.p3: A Gravitix chirongwa idhairekitori rimwe rine .grav mafaera. Nzvimbo yekupinda inogara iri faira raunosarudza kumhanya.
quickstart.p4: state { ... } inozivisa zvinoramba zvichichinjika zvinopona pamameseji. Isu tinovhara izvi zvakadzama muchikamu che State Management.

schedule.p1: Nguva mu at dziri mu UTC. Kana vashandisi vako vari mune imwe nzvimbo yenguva, gadzirisa zvinoenderana (semuenzaniso, UTC+3 vashandisi: shandisa "06:00" ye9 AM yemuno).

state.p1: Shandisa state { } block padanho repamusoro refaira rako:
state.p2: Munda wega wega une zita, mhando, uye kukosha kwakasarudzika (kunoshandiswa kana bot inotanga kutanga).
state.p3: State kukosha kunopona pakati pemameseji uye pakati pe bot restarts. Iwo anochengetwa padhisiki otomatiki.
state.p4: Shandisa state.fieldname chero kupi zvako mukodhi yako:
state.p5: Mamepu ari mu state akanakira pa-per-user data:

strings.cc17: Method chaining inoverengeka kubva kuruboshwe kuenda-kurudyi:
strings.p2: Bata chero kutaura mukati {} mukati metambo:
strings.p3: Unogona kuisa chero kutaura kwakakodzera mukati { } - basa rekufona, arithmetic, kuenzanisa. Hapana muganhu pakuoma kunzwisisa.
strings.p4: Shandisa katatu-makotesheni """...""" kune tambo dzinotambanuka mitsetse yakawanda:
strings.p5: Tambo dzakadzokororwa katatu dzinochengetedza zvese zvichena uye mitsetse mitsva sekunyorwa kwazvakaitwa. Interpolation {} inoshanda mukati mavo nenzira imwechete.
strings.p6: Iwe unogona kufonera akawanda tambo mabasa uchishandisa dot notation - ese masitaera akaenzana:

structs.p1: Shandisa impl TypeName { ... } kubatanidza nzira kune struct. Mukati menzira, self inoreva chiitiko.
structs.p2: Enums tsanangura mhando inogona kunyatsova imwe yemhando dzakasiyana. Variants anogona kuve akajeka (seanogara) kana kutakura data.

syntax.cc2: Tambo ine interpolation - {expression} inotsiviwa nekukosha kwayo
syntax.h4: Multiple handlers for the same trigger
syntax.li2: emit <value> - tumira meseji; kukosha itambo, musiyano, kana chero kutaura
syntax.li3: Yakawanda emit mitsetse → akawanda akasiyana mameseji kumushandisi
syntax.li4: Mabatiro akawanda eiyo trigger yakafanana → yakatariswa kumusoro kusvika pasi, kutanga match inohwina
syntax.p1: Iyo inokonzeresa inoudza bot ini kumhanyisa mubati wemuviri:
syntax.p2: emit inotumira meseji kumushandisi. Mushure mazvo unoisa kukosha kwekutumira:
syntax.p3: Imwe neimwe emit inotumira meseji yakaparadzana. Vanosvika mumwe mushure memumwe:
syntax.p4: Unogona kunyora akati wandei on /command mabati. Iwo anotariswa zvakarongeka - wekutanga uyo guard anopfuura anomhanya. Ona Guard Clauses kuti uwane ruzivo.

types.cc9: State munda unotanga null kusvika wapihwa
types.p1: A 64-bit akasainwa nhamba yakazara. Inotsigira kukosha kubva kunenge −9.2 × 10¹⁸ kusvika +9.2 × 10¹⁸.
types.p10: Dzimwe tsika dzinogona kunge dzisipo. Sarudzo minda mu ctx (senge ctx.username) inogona kunge iri null. Nguva dzose tarisa usati washandisa:
types.p11: Kuwedzera ? mushure merudzi rwamaka se optional - kukosha kungave null. Aya ndiwo mabatiro anoita ma paramita uye state minda inotaura "izvi zvingave kana kusavapo":
types.p12: Kana kukosha kungasagara kuripo, tsanangura T? uye gara uchitarisa != null usati waishandisa. Kuwana null ndima hakuparadze bot - it returns null chinyararire.
types.p3: 10 / 3 ine mbiri int tsika inopa 3 (yakaderedzwa). Shandisa 10.0 / 3.0 kuwana mibairo yedesimali.
types.p5: A Unicode mavara tambo. Tambo zvinhu zvisingachinjiki.
types.p6: Kutevedzana kwakarongeka kwehunhu, ese emhando imwechete T.
types.p7: Kuwana indekisi kunze kwechikamu (semuenzaniso, nums[99] kana runyoro rwuine zvinhu zvishanu) returns null pane kurovera bot yako.
types.p8: Muunganidzwa wemabhii-value pairs. Makiyi anofanirwa kunge ari mhando imwe chete, hunhu hunofanirwa kunge hwakafanana.
types.p9: Iyo return mhando yemabasa ayo asina return kukosha. Haunyanyi kunyora void zvakajeka - ndiyo inosarudzika kana pasina return mhando yatsanangurwa.

variables.li2: Inogona kunge ine mavara, manhamba, underscores: user_count, page2
variables.p1: Zvinosiyana-siyana chengetedza tsika dzaunogona kushandisa uye kushandura purogiramu yako yose.
variables.p3: Iyo compiler infers mhando kubva kukosha kudivi rekurudyi. Haufanire kunyora mhando yacho zvakajeka - asi iwe can.
variables.p5: Zviziviso ndezvesarudzo - zvishandise kana mhando isiri pachena kubva pakukosha, kana kana iwe uchida kuti kodhi ive self-kunyora.
variables.p6: Variables zvinochinjika nekukasira. Govera kukosha kutsva ne =:
variables.p8: Variables dziripo mukati meblock { } zvakaziviswa mukati. Izvo hazvionekwe kunze kwechibhuroko ichi:

wizard.title: Node Setup
wizard.nodeDesc: Seta zita remudziyo uye chiteshi. Iyi data ichaonekwa kune dzimwe node pane network yemuno.
wizard.deviceNameHint: Inoonekwa kune mamwe ma node pane network.
wizard.networkDesc: Sarudza kuti node yako ichaita sei.
wizard.netLocalDesc: Wi-Fi / LAN. Inoshanda pasina internet. Midziyo inowana yega yega.
wizard.netGlobalDesc: Kuburikidza neinternet. Cloudflare Tunnel + traffic obfuscation. Svika kubva kupi zvako munyika.
wizard.cfNotFound: cloudflared haina kuwanikwa. Iise kuti ugone kugonesa pasi rose mode.
wizard.sslDesc: Sarudza nzira yekuwana HTTPS chitupa. Yakakurudzirwa kuita yakazara browser kushanda (maikorofoni, kamera, WebRTC).
wizard.sslSelfDesc: Inogadzirwa otomatiki, inoshanda mu LAN isina internet
wizard.sslLeDesc: Chitupa chemahara chakavimbika. Inoda domain uye port 80.
wizard.sslNoneDesc: HTTP chete. Zvimwe zvebrowser zvinogona kunge zvisipo.
wizard.installCa: Isa CA mune system trust store
wizard.adminPasswordHint: Inodiwa CA kuisirwa musystem trust store. Password inoshandiswa kamwe chete uye haina kuchengetwa.
wizard.mkcertInfo: mkcert inogadzira zvitupa zvinovimbwa munharaunda pasina yambiro yebrowser. Yakasununguka zvachose, inoshanda pasina internet.
wizard.domainHint: Domain inofanirwa kunongedza kune iyi server IP
wizard.stagingHint: Haishandise LE chiyero chemuganho, chitupa hachivimbike
wizard.noSslWarning: Pasina HTTPS: maikorofoni/kamera yekufona, zviziviso, geolocation ichave isisipo. Mamwe mabhurawuza anovhara WebSocket pasina SSL.
wizard.authDesc: Rongedza nzira dzekupinda dzevashandisi venode yako. Unogona kusvetuka izvi wozviwedzera gare gare muzvirongwa.
wizard.passkeysDesc: Pinda uchishandisa biometrics, Bata ID kana PIN. Hapana masevhisi ekunze anodiwa - anoshanda kuburikidza nebrowser/OS.
wizard.reviewDesc: Zvese zvinotaridzika zvakanaka? Zvirongwa zvichachengetwa ku .env faira mushure mekutangwa.
wizard.launchedDesc: Setup wizard yapera. Kuvhura main interface...
wizard.enterAdminPassword: Isa password yemutungamiriri kuti uise CA
wizard.caInstalled: CA yakaiswa musystem trust store - tangazve browser yako
wizard.sslSkipped: SSL akasvetuka. Node inomhanya pa HTTP.

onboarding.step1Text: Dzvanya apa kuti ugadzire imba itsva yekutaura
onboarding.step2Text: Govera iyi kodhi neshamwari kuti uvakoke
onboarding.step3Text: Nyora meseji yako yekutanga uye rova ​​​​Enter
onboarding.step4Text: Mameseji ese akavharidzirwa - iwe chete nemugamuchiri munogona kuaverenga
onboarding.step5Text: Ongorora Vortex - gadzira makamuri, wedzera vanobatika, gadzirisa marongero

permissions.customHint: Bvisa mvumo yenhengo iyi. Izvi zvinoshanda zvisinei nebasa razvo.
permissions.canSendMediaDesc: Inogona kutumira mafoto, mavhidhiyo, uye mafaera
permissions.canSendStickersDesc: Inogona kutumira zvimiti, maGIF, uye emoji mapakeji
permissions.canDeleteOthersDesc: Inogona kudzima mameseji kubva kune dzimwe nhengo
permissions.canChangeInfoDesc: Inogona kuchinja kamuri zita, tsananguro, uye avatar
permissions.canManageCallsDesc: Inogona kutanga, kupedza, uye kugadzirisa nhare dzeboka
